strings.Value: Every enemy in a 30-foot radius takes {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d12{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} per {g|Encyclopedia:Caster_Level}caster level{/g}. Half of this damage is {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}fire damage{/g} and half of it is holy. A successful {g|Encyclopedia:Saving_Throw}Reflex saving throw{/g} reduces the amount to {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d10{/g} damage per caster level.

You make a {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g} against any undead creature. If it fails a {g|Encyclopedia:Saving_Throw}Will saving throw{/g}, it is immediately destroyed. If the target succeeds, it takes {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}2d6{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}holy{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} plus 1 damage per two {g|Encyclopedia:Caster_Level}caster levels{/g}.
The target gains immunity to diseases.

Any time the target is hit by a demon, the demon takes {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d6{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}holy{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} plus 1 damage per two caster levels. Additionally, the target gains a deflection {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:Armor_Class}AC{/g} equal to 2 plus 1 per six caster levels.
All allies in a 20-foot radius gain immunity to diseases.
The target gains immunity to the {g|ConditionNauseated}nauseated{/g} and {g|ConditionSickened}sickened{/g} conditions, diseases, and poisons.

This {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} affects all undead creatures, {g|Encyclopedia:Alignment}evil{/g} outsiders, and adepts of evil deities. If the target fails a {g|Encyclopedia:Saving_Throw}Will saving throw{/g}, it's {g|ConditionFrightened}frightened{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Combat_Round}round{/g} per {g|Encyclopedia:Caster_Level}caster level{/g}. If the saving throw is successful, the target is {g|ConditionShaken}shaken{/g} for 1 round. This spell ignores immunity to fear effects.
